title: Saddle Finance - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual sequence of flash loan and reserve donation in the same transaction
monitoring_rules: BLOCK donateToReserves() if preceded by FLASHLOAN_BORROW in the same transaction
summary: Attackers exploited Saddle Finance by taking a flash loan and immediately donating the funds to reserves, draining the protocol. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
